chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 69 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: إن المؤمن إذا دعا الله عز وجل أجابه - فشخص بصري نحوه إعجابا بها - قال، فقال: إن الله واسع لخلقه.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 69. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Indeed, when a believer calls upon Allah, He replies him. (The reporter) said: I stared at him in amazement. Then the Imam (a.s) said: Indeed, Allah bestows amply on His creatures.
